caption: The video appears to be concluding with a call-to-action screen. The background is filled with static, resembling an old television signal loss, creating a nostalgic and somewhat urgent atmosphere. On the left side of the screen, there is a bold white text that reads "SUBSCRIBE!" accompanied by a yellow arrow pointing to the right, encouraging viewers to subscribe to the channel. On the right side, the word "PATREON" is displayed in white text with a yellow arrow pointing to the left, directing viewers to support the creator through Patreon. The overall design is simple yet effective, using contrasting colors and clear directions to engage the audience and prompt them to take action.
